landing.aboutImgAlt: Emirati youth exploring the Leadership Digital Empowerment Platform
landing.heroSub: A national program empowering Emirati youth aged 13–18 — a digital and experiential journey across six leadership pillars, from discovering potential to leading with impact.
landing.aboutLead: Youth Leaders Path is a hybrid leadership journey by the Federal Youth Authority — combining digital innovation with experiential learning to develop future-ready Emirati youth.
landing.aboutBody: Through the Leadership Digital Empowerment Platform, participants learn in a gamified, engaging way, document their growth responsibly, and stakeholders track impact in real time — from registration all the way to community impact projects.
landing.aboutStory: This isn't just a program — it's where a generation discovers who they are, and how far they can lead.

aboutCards.title: Growth documentation & reflection
points: Document progress in text, image and video
Build an integrated personal leadership record
Continuous reflection along the growth path

aboutCards.title: A fun, interactive journey
points: Learning that feels like a fun competition

aboutCards.title: Keeping parents engaged
points: A dedicated interface to follow the journey

aboutCards.title: Transparent, merit-based selection
points: Standardized assessment across the six pillars

aboutPoints.title: An engaging, gamified journey
aboutPoints.desc: Short videos, motivating quizzes, XP points and leadership badges turn learning into a fun competition.

aboutPoints.title: Growth documentation & reflection
aboutPoints.desc: Participants document progress in text, image and video — building a personal leadership record.

aboutPoints.title: Transparent, merit-based selection
aboutPoints.desc: Standardized assessment across the six pillars selects the top 40 for the experiential program with full transparency.

aboutPoints.title: Parents stay engaged
aboutPoints.desc: A dedicated interface keeps guardians informed of their child's journey and community project impact.

landing.journeySub: The program is designed as one integrated journey: it starts digitally at national scale, deepens through hands-on experience, and its impact continues well beyond.

journeyPhases.line: It begins on your screen — and reaches every emirate.
highlights: Gamified lessons across all six pillars
A baseline assessment that's fair and transparent

journeyPhases.line: The top 40 step off the screen and into the real world.
highlights: 8 immersive days in Ras Al Khaimah

journeyPhases.line: The journey doesn't end — it turns into impact.
highlights: Parents stay engaged through the platform

landing.pillarsTitle: Six pillars that shape a leader
landing.pillarsSub: Each pillar is a full learning journey: short videos, gamified quizzes, action-based challenges, and reflections that document your growth.
landing.partnersTitle: In partnership with leading national entities
landing.impactSub: Every participant is assessed across the six pillars — fairly and transparently. The strongest 40 advance to the experiential program in Ras Al Khaimah.
landing.impactStep3Label: Top leaders to Ras Al Khaimah
landing.ctaTitle: Your seat among tomorrow's leaders awaits
landing.ctaSub: Register now and start the digital assessment — the top 40 participants qualify for the experiential program in Ras Al Khaimah.
landing.footerAbout: Youth Leaders Path — a national program by the Federal Youth Authority building a generation of Emirati leaders through digital learning and real-world experience.
